(born 1949) is an American film producer, film director, playwright and retired actress. She teaches acting at the Hollywood Court Theater.

Connor, Matt (January 17, 2009). **Christina Hart** (born 1949) is an American film producer, film director, playwright and retired actress. She teaches acting at the Hollywood Court Theater.

She has appeared in such films as *[The Stewardesses](/wiki/The_Stewardesses "The Stewardesses")* (1969), *[The Mad Bomber](/wiki/The_Mad_Bomber_(film) "The Mad Bomber (film)")* (1973) and *[Charley Varrick](/wiki/Charley_Varrick "Charley Varrick")* (1973).

## Life and career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Christina_Hart&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Life and career")]

Christina Hart was born in 1949 in [Lock Haven, Pennsylvania](/wiki/Lock_Haven,_Pennsylvania "Lock Haven, Pennsylvania"), to an elementary school teacher father.[[1]](#cite_note-1) She has been acting professionally since 1958 in television and motion pictures, although she has stated that her true passion is for the theater. She formed DOXA Productions with actress Kara Pulcino, and has produced and directed under that label since 2006.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

She was married to actor [Frank Doubleday](/wiki/Frank_Doubleday_(actor) "Frank Doubleday (actor)") for over 40 years, until his death in 2018.[[2]](#cite_note-THR-2) The couple has two daughters, actresses [Kaitlin](/wiki/Kaitlin_Doubleday "Kaitlin Doubleday") and [Portia Doubleday](/wiki/Portia_Doubleday "Portia Doubleday").[[2]](#cite_note-THR-2)

## Theater

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Christina_Hart&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Theater")]

As a playwright, Hart is most known for *Women Over the Influence* and *Birds of a Feather*, and was nominated for an LA Stage Alliance Ovation Award for Best Original Play in 2012. [*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*] She has directed over 50 plays.

## Filmography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Christina_Hart&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Filmography")]

* *[The Stewardesses](/wiki/The_Stewardesses "The Stewardesses")* (1969) as Samantha
* *The Woman and Bloody Terror* (1970) as Karen Washington
* *[Red Sky at Morning](/wiki/Red_Sky_at_Morning_(1971_film) "Red Sky at Morning (1971 film)")* (1971) as Velva Mae Cloyd
* *[The Roommates](/wiki/The_Roommates "The Roommates")* (1973) as Paula
* *[The Mad Bomber](/wiki/The_Mad_Bomber_(film) "The Mad Bomber (film)")* (1973) as Fromley's Victim
* *[Charley Varrick](/wiki/Charley_Varrick "Charley Varrick")* (1973) as Jana
* *The Bunny Caper* (aka *Sex Play*, *Games Girls Play*) (1974) as Bunny O'Hara
* *[The Daughters of Joshua Cabe Return](/wiki/The_Daughters_of_Joshua_Cabe "The Daughters of Joshua Cabe")* (1975) as Charity
* *The Runaway Barge* (1975) as Reba Washburn
* *Keep Off My Grass!* (1975)
* *[Johnny Firecloud](/wiki/Johnny_Firecloud "Johnny Firecloud")* (1975) as June
* *Addie and the King of Hearts* (1976) as Kathleen Tate
* *[Dead of Night](/wiki/Dead_of_Night_(1977_film) "Dead of Night (1977 film)")* (1977) as Helen
* *[Mean Dog Blues](/wiki/Mean_Dog_Blues "Mean Dog Blues")* (1978) as Gloria Kinsman
* *The Night the City Screamed* (1980) as Woman in Elevator
* *[The Sophisticated Gents](/wiki/The_Sophisticated_Gents "The Sophisticated Gents")* (1981) as Gerda
* *[Hear No Evil](/wiki/Hear_No_Evil_(1982_film) "Hear No Evil (1982 film)")* (1982) as Sheila Green
* *The Check Is in the Mail...* (1986) as Janet

### Television

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Christina_Hart&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Television")]

* *[Ironside](/wiki/Ironside_(1967_TV_series) "Ironside (1967 TV series)")* (1972) as Jan Ritter
* *[The Bold Ones: The New Doctors](/wiki/The_Bold_Ones:_The_New_Doctors "The Bold Ones: The New Doctors")* (1972) as Jan Ritter
* *[Can Ellen Be Saved](/wiki/Can_Ellen_Be_Saved "Can Ellen Be Saved")?* (1974) as Mary
* *[Shazam!](/wiki/Shazam!_(TV_series) "Shazam! (TV series)")* (1974) as Holly
* *[The Rookies](/wiki/The_Rookies "The Rookies")* (1974) as Lorna Marsh
* *[Petrocelli](/wiki/Petrocelli "Petrocelli")* (1974) as Niki James
* *[The Odd Couple](/wiki/The_Odd_Couple_(1970_TV_series) "The Odd Couple (1970 TV series)")* (1975) as Susan
* *[The Texas Wheelers](/wiki/The_Texas_Wheelers "The Texas Wheelers")* (1975) as Librarian
* *[The Blue Knight](/wiki/The_Blue_Knight_(TV_series) "The Blue Knight (TV series)")* (1976) as Kiki
* *[Helter Skelter](/wiki/Helter_Skelter_(1976_film) "Helter Skelter (1976 film)")* (1976) as [Patricia "Katie" Krenwinkel](/wiki/Patricia_Krenwinkel "Patricia Krenwinkel")
* *[Happy Days](/wiki/Happy_Days "Happy Days")* (1974–1976) as Carole Actman/Kitty
* *[Charlie's Angels](/wiki/Charlie%27s_Angels "Charlie's Angels")* (1976) as Billie
* *[C.P.O. Sharkey](/wiki/C.P.O._Sharkey "C.P.O. Sharkey")* (1977) as Helen
* *[The Six Million Dollar Man](/wiki/The_Six_Million_Dollar_Man "The Six Million Dollar Man")* (1977) as Margaret
* *[The Fantastic Journey](/wiki/The_Fantastic_Journey "The Fantastic Journey")* (1977) as Gwenith
* *[The Streets of San Francisco](/wiki/The_Streets_of_San_Francisco "The Streets of San Francisco")* (1977) as Nancy Telson
* *[Three's Company](/wiki/Three%27s_Company "Three's Company")* (1977) as Karen
* *[Hawaii Five-O](/wiki/Hawaii_Five-O_(1968_TV_series) "Hawaii Five-O (1968 TV series)")* (1977) as Chris Harmon
* *[Barnaby Jones](/wiki/Barnaby_Jones "Barnaby Jones")* (1976–1978) as Amanda/Jenna Smith
* *[David Cassidy: Man Undercover](/wiki/David_Cassidy:_Man_Undercover "David Cassidy: Man Undercover")* (1978) as Bobbi
* *[The Incredible Hulk](/wiki/The_Incredible_Hulk_(1978_TV_series) "The Incredible Hulk (1978 TV series)")* (1979) as Cassie Floyd
* *The Runaways* (1979) as Jeanne Norris
* *[Detective School](/wiki/Detective_School "Detective School")* (1979) as Yolanda
* *[B. J. and the Bear](/wiki/B._J._and_the_Bear "B. J. and the Bear")* (1980, Season 2, Episode 26, "Bear Bondage") as Janet Lockwood
* *[The Love Boat](/wiki/The_Love_Boat "The Love Boat")* (1981) as Cindy Sterling
* *[Three's Company](/wiki/Three%27s_Company "Three's Company")* (1977–1981) as Francesca Angelino/Karen
* *[Dynasty](/wiki/Dynasty_(1981_TV_series) "Dynasty (1981 TV series)")* (1981) as Bedelia
* *[CHiPs](/wiki/CHiPs "CHiPs")* (1982, Season 5, Episode 17, "Alarmed") as Toni Sykes
* *[Hear No Evil](/wiki/Hear_No_Evil_(1982_film) "Hear No Evil (1982 film)")* (1982 [made-for-TV-movie](/wiki/Television_film "Television film")) as Sheila Green[[3]](#cite_note-FOOTNOTETerrace1985188-3)[[4]](#cite_note-Evil-4)[[5]](#cite_note-FOOTNOTETerrace2011445-5)
* *[Simon & Simon](/wiki/Simon_%26_Simon "Simon & Simon")* (1982) as Stewardess April
* *[Airwolf](/wiki/Airwolf "Airwolf")* (1985) as Mrs. Cove
* *[Murder, She Wrote](/wiki/Murder,_She_Wrote "Murder, She Wrote")* (1989) as Sister Maria
